personas.label: Core maintainer
personas.description: Maintains a mature repository and is skeptical of bot-generated churn.

personas.label: Dependency debugger
personas.description: Uses Kitsoki to fix a bug in a dependency blocking their own project.

personas.label: Docs-minded contributor
personas.description: Values clear onboarding and follows documented paths before improvising.

personas.label: IDE-first engineer
personas.description: Expects editor and visual surfaces to explain state without terminal archaeology.

personas.label: Hobbyist contributor
personas.description: Contributes in spare time and needs a low-context path from issue selection to a credible small change.

personas.label: Bugfix Contributor
personas.description: Clustered from 3 mined session span(s). Sample goal(s): why do we keep losing the mcp tools - i updated .<file> a few times an apparently it's gone again | we have some .kitsoki-owner problem that's preventing us from merging some bug fixes - i was using bug fix in a previous | file the bug, then land the fixes

personas.label: Docs Writer
personas.description: Clustered from 1 mined session span(s). Sample goal(s): just file the ticket, we'll handle it async, need to commit the bugs to the repo for now - we'll evolve it before we rel

personas.label: Explorer
personas.description: Clustered from 3 mined session span(s). Sample goal(s): i want to dogfood kitsoki to build a critical new feature - we need to create a standardized per-agent definition that c | what does it take to get an extension uploaded to vs code marketplace? | is there an rrweb viewer extension for vs code?

personas.label: Feature Implementer
personas.description: Clustered from 2 mined session span(s). Sample goal(s): this repo is fresh on this machine - i want make install to run cleanly, there should be some make setup job that will i | if make install fails, give a message that maybe make setup is needed

personas.label: Maintainer
personas.description: Clustered from 1 mined session span(s). Sample goal(s): delete them - it's a testing node so it's ok

personas.label: Verifier
